title: phyllanthus purpureus
intro: Phyllanthus purpureus, also known as the purple leaf-flowering tree, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus purpureus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting liver health, making it a valuable herb in many cultures. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus purpureus can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
